description_long: This is a large, cylindrical orange traffic barrel with three wide, horizontal reflective silver-gray stripes encircling its midsection. The body is segmented into three stacked sections, each separated by a reflective band, and the top features a solid, flat surface with a rectangular handle integrated for easy lifting or moving. The base is wide, black, and octagonal, providing stability and preventing tipping, and appears to be made of a heavier material than the body. The surface of the barrel is smooth with a matte finish, and the reflective stripes are slightly raised, likely made of a different, more reflective material. There are no visible logos, text, or markings on any part of the object. The overall condition appears new, with no signs of wear, dirt, or damage.
description: A large orange traffic barrel with three silver-gray reflective stripes and a wide, black octagonal base. It has a handle on top and appears new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on top, three reflective stripes, and the full octagonal black base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the handle's rectangular cutout and the layered structure of the barrel.
description_view_2: Side view with clear visibility of the three reflective stripes and the smooth, unmarked surface.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the continuity of the reflective stripes and the solid, stable base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Three wide, horizontal, silver-gray reflective stripes evenly spaced around the midsection of the barrel.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, solid, and orange with an integrated rectangular handle for carrying.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, black, octagonal, and appears thick and weighted for stability, likely made of rubber.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible.
